candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows 100% conviction SHORT but green_matches=0, treat the historical hit_rate as unanchored and cut size — high live conviction without a single historical green match is pattern-novelty, not pattern-confirmation.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.99 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.5; if news_high_impact_days_until == 0: veto_new_entries == True
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
